<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [West.cn/西部数码](https://www.west.cn) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/westcn/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "westcn"
  dnsCredentials:
    # WESTCN_PASSWORD: API password
    password: ""
    # WESTCN_USERNAME: Username
    username: ""
    # WESTCN_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # WESTCN_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 10)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # WESTCN_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 120)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # WESTCN_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 60)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
